# slideshowWillStart()

**Instance Method**

Performs custom tasks when the slideshow is about to start.

## Declaration

```swift
optional func slideshowWillStart()
```

## Discussion

Image Kit invokes this method when the slideshow is about to start. Implement this method to perform custom tasks at that time.

## Related Documentation

- **IKSlideshowDataSource**: The `IKSlideshowDataSource` protocol describes the methods that an [doc://com.apple.quartz/documentation/Quartz/IKSlideshow] object uses to access the contents of its data source object.

## Performing Custom Tasks

- **slideshowDidStop()**: Performs custom tasks when the slideshow stops.
- **slideshowDidChangeCurrentIndex(_:)**: Performs custom tasks when the slideshow changes to the item at the specified index.
